definition: Courses focused on communication, interpersonal skills, leadership, teamwork, workplace etiquette, and professional development.
Courses designed to improve grammar, speaking, writing, vocabulary, pronunciation, and overall English proficiency.
Courses that prepare learners for employment through resume building, interview preparation, aptitude, and workplace readiness.
Courses covering business planning, startup fundamentals, innovation, and entrepreneurial mindset.
Courses on SEO, social media marketing, content marketing, email marketing, paid advertising, and analytics.
Courses covering computer fundamentals, programming, networking, databases, software, and IT systems.
Courses on artificial intelligence, machine learning, data analytics, and data science applications.
Courses related to healthcare, medicine, nursing, allied health sciences, and medical technologies.
Courses in civil engineering, architecture, project execution, building technologies, and infrastructure development.
Courses covering accounting principles, taxation, financial management, auditing, banking, and investment fundamentals.
